Spec: Create the Tauri macOS shell, request camera permission, and expose a settings panel.
Acceptance Criteria: App launches on macOS, requests camera access, and stores permission state.

Spec: Create a local face-tracking service that emits landmark/expression JSON to the app.
Acceptance Criteria: Tracker returns face presence, head pose, blink, smile, and mouth state in JSON.

Spec: Map tracker output to mascot states and animation cues.
Acceptance Criteria: Mascot can enter idle, attentive, listening, speaking, happy, and tired states.

Spec: Document local-first processing, non-sensitive cues only, and no sensitive inference.
Acceptance Criteria: Docs clearly state scope, data handling, and forbidden inference categories.

Spec: Create visual rules using an Apple-inspired design language from DESIGN.md.
Acceptance Criteria: DESIGN.md exists and contains layout, motion, color, and mascot presentation rules.

Spec: Install local secret scanning and commit protection for staged files.
Acceptance Criteria: Secret scan blocks staged secrets; hook installed and documented.
